# User Story

As an exporter

I need to be able to provide storage facility approval number and product storage method

So that I can comply with EU regulations

## Acceptance Criteria

Scenario 1 - Storage facility approval number over 50 characters - Save and continue

Given I have navigated to /add-storage-facility-approval page

When I have added an approval number of over 50 characters and pressed 'Save and continue'

Then I will see a field-level error message of "Approval number must not exceed 50 characters**"**

And the error message will be displayed at the top of the page

And the details will not be saved to the application

And the 'Storage facility' section on Your Progress will be marked as "Incomplete"

Scenario 2 - Storage facility approval number over 50 characters - Save as draft

Given I have navigated to /add-storage-facility-approval page

When I have added an approval number of over 50 characters and pressed 'Save as draft"

Then I am navigated to /create-non-manipulation-document/non-manipulation-documents _(/create-storage-document/storage-documents)_

And the details **will be** saved to the application

And the 'Storage facility' section on Your Progress will be marked as "Incomplete"

Scenario 3 - Approval number invalid characters - Save and continue

Given I have navigated to /add-storage-facility-approval in my non-manpulation document user journey

When I have added an approval number containing characters other than letters, numbers, hyphens, full stops, forward slashes and spaces and pressed 'Save and continue'

Then I will see a field-level error message of "Approval number must only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, full stops, forward slashes and spaces**"**

And the error message will be displayed at the top of the page

And the details will not be saved to the application

And the 'Storage facility' section on Your Progress will be marked as "Incomplete"

Scenario 4 - Approval number invalid characters - Save as draft

Given I have navigated to /add-storage-facility-approval in my non-manpulation document user journey

When I have added an approval number containing characters other than letters, numbers, hyphens, full stops, forward slashes and spaces and pressed 'Save as draft"

Then I am navigated to /create-non-manipulation-document/non-manipulation-documents _(/create-storage-document/storage-documents)_

And the details **will be** saved to the application

And the 'Storage facility' section on Your Progress will be marked as "Incomplete"

Scenario 5 - Welsh translations

Given I have navigated to /add-storage-facility-approval in my non-manpulation document user journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then all wording is translated to Welsh

| **English text**                                                                                    | **Welsh translation**                                                                                                  |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Approval number must not exceed 50 characters                                                       | Ni chaiff rhif y gymeradwyaeth fod yn fwy na 50 o gymeriadau                                                           |
| Approval number must only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, full stops, forward slashes and spaces | Rhaid i rif y gymeradwyaeth gynnwys llythrennau, rhifau, cysylltnodau, atalnodau llawn, blaenslaesau a bylchau yn unig |

Scenario 6 - Non JS

Given I have navigated to /add-storage-facility-approval in my non-manpulation document user journey

When javascript is turned off

Then all the page must be compliant with non javascript

Scenario 7 - Accessibility

Given I have navigated to /add-storage-facility-approval in my non-manpulation document user journey

Then the page must be compliant with GDS accessibility guidelines

Bottom of Form
